overview.description: The Direxion Daily 7-10 Year Treasury Bear 3X ETF (TYO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the ICE BofA US Treasury (7-10 Y) index. The fund provides daily -3x exposure to a market-value weighted index of U.S. Treasury bonds with remaining maturities between 7 and 10 years. TYO was launched on Apr 16, 2009 and is issued by Direxion.
